MD. FAHAD ALI Full Stack Developer +8801867758990 | fahad288ali@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn Summary Full Stack Developer specializing in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, particularly Next.js, Node.js, Fastify, and Express.js. Experienced in architecting and deploying scalable SaaS applications, as well as building AI-powered platforms integrated with RAG pipelines, PostgreSQL, and PGVector. Strong background in designing robust backend systems, automating CRM and presentation workflows, and developing interactive, canvas-based frontend visualizations. Focused on delivering reliable, containerized solutions using Docker that efficiently handle high concurrent user traffic. Experience SolveTech Solution : Full Stack Developer 09/2025 – Present • Developed PropDNA.ai , an AI-powered real estate analytics platform using Next.js, Fastify, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), PostgreSQL, Docker, and Konva for interactive canvas-based visualizations. • Architected an AI-powered slide generation system that automates presentation creation, utilizing advanced LLMs for intelligent content generation and seamless layout optimization. • Implemented Go High Level customizations for CRM workflows, enhancing automation and client management capabilities for marketing agencies. • Architected and deployed multiple SaaS applications with scalable backend systems, implementing secure authentication, real-time data processing, and API integrations. • Utilized Docker for containerization and deployment, ensuring consistent environments across development and production. • Integrated RAG pipelines with PostgreSQL and PGVector for advanced semantic search and AI-driven content retrieval. Pirhotech.com : Full stack developer 07/2023 – 09/2025 • Developed and deployed multiple SaaS and e-commerce applications, scaling to handle 700+ concurrent users. • Built secure, high-performance systems with Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Docker, ensuring reliability and scalability. • Collaborated with organisations like Biddarthi to design and deliver scalable, production-ready platforms. Devsonket : Open Source Contributor 03/2023 - 05/2023 • An organization involved in developing open-source projects • Improved developer documentation at Devsonket, increasing clarity for 500+ monthly users (JavaScript, Python). • Maintained Puppeteer.js Cheat Sheets, helping 300+ developers with browser automation. NASA Space Apps Challenge Hackathon : Member 09/2024 - 09/2024 • A global hackathon held to address challenges Earth faces, using space data • Built a prototype named ’Existence’, an educational tool on solar flares and the solar system, enhancing understanding of space phenomena • Advanced to the preliminary round of the NASA Space Apps Challenge among 100+ teams. Education Green University of Bangladesh , B.Sc. (Hons) in Computer Science & Engineering 01/2022 – 02/2026 Cantonment Public School & College , Higher Secondary Certificate 01/2019 – 01/2021 Cantonment Public School & College , Secondary School Certificate 01/2017 – 01/2018
Certification NASA Space Apps Challenge - Certificate of Participation in the NASA Space Apps Challenge AgentX - Microsoft - Certificate for prompt engineering and developing chatbots FreeCodeCamp — Certificate in Frontend Development Udemy — Certificate in Backend Development Key Achievements • Building impactful educational tools • Successfully built real-time applications and educational tools that enhance user interactions and understanding of complex subjects Languages English . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . Native Skills Frontend: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, TailwindCSS, WebGL, Three.js Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST API, GraphQL, Socket.IO AI/LLM Tools: LangChain, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), PGVector Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL DevOps/Cloud: Docker, AWS, Vercel Others: Git, GitHub, Bash Projects AI-based Educational Platform with Gamification 2/2025 • Created an AI-powered learning platform featuring a real-time chatbot and gamified badge system. • Engineered real-time WebSocket architecture allowing multiple students to seamlessly participate in live, AI-generated challenges. • Tech Stack: Next.js, Node.js, Socket.IO, Render. • Website: skill-street.onrender.com | GitHub: md-fahad-ali/idp-project Turfslot.com — Booking platform for turf 11/2024 • Developed a robust turf booking platform handling 100+ daily transactions with seamless payment integration. • Tech Stack: Next.js, Express.js, Supabase, SSLCommerz. • Website: turfslot.com Biddarthi.org — A platform for selling courses 08/2023 • Architected a comprehensive course-selling platform serving 700+ active students with integrated secure payment gateways. • Tech Stack: Next.js, PostgreSQL, SSLCommerz, LaTeX. Real-Time Chat App 05/2022 • Built a real-time chat application featuring instant messaging, typing indicators, and reliable online status tracking. • Tech Stack: Next.js, Express.js, Socket.IO.
